manifest_rows.carry_row_hypothesis: Panel and display leader intended to add lower-basis electronics carry rows rather than only saturated theme-growth carry evidence.
Optoelectronics semiconductor name intended to probe mid-basis carry rows in a hardware cycle different from the current island.
Auto trend leader intended to probe longer carry duration under stronger trend persistence than the current shared one-score carry rows.
Shipbuilding cyclical intended to add slower multi-day carry duration variation in a regime unlike the current theme_q4 island.
Shipping leader intended to create rows where challenger and anchors stop sharing the same exit date under slower decay and replacement pressure.
Consumer electronics manufacturer intended to test exit-alignment breaks in a demand-sensitive hardware regime.
Software platform leader intended to probe whether carry-like negative-cycle basis can reappear outside current semiconductor-heavy islands.
Precision manufacturing name intended to test cross-dataset carry reuse in a broader industrial-electronics context without using opening-led clone logic.

interpretation: The v4 refresh manifest should satisfy both the old target-coverage gate and the new carry-row-diversity criteria gate.
That means every symbol must stay new versus the combined reference base and must enter with an explicit carry-row hypothesis.
Pure opening-led clone logic is not an acceptable primary admission reason for this v4 refresh.
